article_meta.title: Family Welcome To The Future, Where AI Grandma Raises The Kid You Bought From The Baby Bank By: Elle Purnell November 19

reasoning: No attribution violations and most flagged passages are genuine author-level bias, but the model used non-approved bias type labels throughout and missed several significant biased phrasings in the author’s prose.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items are from the author’s prose; none are from quoted or clearly attributed sources.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Flagged phrases are legitimately loaded, slanted, or ideological in the author’s voice; few if any are overreaches.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed prominent biased phrasings such as the headline (“kid you bought from the baby bank”), “haunt your children forever,” “repulsive and deeply disrespectful,” “ripped away from his birth mother,” jibe at Philip Bump, and other loaded framings.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels like ‘Loaded Language,’ ‘Framing Bias,’ ‘Selection/Omission Bias,’ ‘False Equivalence,’ and ‘Religious/Ideological Bias’ are outside the specified set; several could have mapped to Word Choice/Sensationalism, Slant, Bias by Omission, Flawed Logic, etc.
